guardrails.note: Read-only human approval clearance pack. It consolidates source, SEO, copydesk, and link issues before a human reviewer decides whether to run mark:review.
guardrails.stopBefore: Stop before source edits, metadata edits, mark:review, and publish. Every change requires human approval.

sourceEvidence.trafficNote: No measured traffic, ranking, impression, click, conversion, or revenue claim is made.
